title: 🎉 Our Professor Received the Academic Excellence Award
summary: The Academic Excellence Award is presented to researchers who have made outstanding contributions to their field and have been recognized by the academic community.

title: 🏆 Our Professor Received the Outstanding Teaching Award
summary: This year, the selection committee reviewed candidates from universities nationwide. Our professor was among the outstanding recipients recognized for their exceptional teaching contributions.

title: 「2025 International Conference on AI and Sustainable Society」Successfully Concluded
summary: The 2025 International Conference on AI and Sustainable Society was held on November 13–14, 2025 and concluded successfully.

title: Lab Admission Open
summary: We welcome students interested in joining our research team to explore cutting-edge fields of AI and educational technology!

title: 🎊 Our Professor Received the Distinguished IT Professional Award
summary: This award aims to recognize individuals who have made outstanding contributions to the IT industry, encouraging more talented professionals to actively engage in technological research and innovation.

title: Welcome New Graduate Students (Academic Year 114)
summary: Welcome to new master's students joining our lab family. We look forward to sparking great research ideas together.

title: 🎉 Our Professor Elected as Fellow of the Engineering Society
summary: Congratulations to our professor on this outstanding achievement!

title: Our Professor Received the Annual Contribution Award
summary: Our professor actively promoted domestic sustainable science research during their tenure as convener, bridging domestic and international academic networks with dedication and enthusiasm.
